title: Swords -> Lightsabers (with sound)
description: I turned all of the vanilla swords into lightsabers. They also have sound! More items coming soon!
body: # ⚔️ Lightsaber Swords 🔦 **Turns all swords into epic lightsabers - with matching sounds!** This resource pack transforms *all* standard Minecraft swords into lightsabers. Each sword type has its own lightsaber design, with iconic sci-fi sound effects during combat. Sounds only apply when hitting normally, not when critting. ## ✨ Features - Replaces all vanilla swords with lightsaber models - Includes custom sound effects for attacks and usage - Fully client-side - Compatible with shaders 🎧 Not every lightsaber has a unique sound, but the overall feel delivers that epic Star Wars vibe. 📦 **Download now** and bring the power of the Force to your Minecraft world! If you want to support me: Check the external links...
